## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written **before** implementation (TDD: red → green)

- [ ] REUSE copyright header added to every new file
- [ ] `clang-format` applied (`clang-format -i src/**/*.cc include/**/*.hh`)
- [ ] No new warnings from `clang-tidy`
